commit.subject: LU-19332 tests: honor user defined DEF_STRIPE_COUNT
commit.message:
LU-19332 tests: honor user defined DEF_STRIPE_COUNT

so we can easily run sanity using different default stripe count.

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
